tg_connector_up_stale{connector="netbox",series="tg_connector_up"} 0
tg_connector_up_stale{connector="snmp",series="tg_connector_up"} 1
tg_connector_up{connector="netbox"} 1
tg_connector_up{connector="snmp"} 1
